overview: Jain Grocery is a mobile-first web app for a local grocery store in Devpura, Bundi, Rajasthan. Customers can browse 13 products with Hindi descriptions and user-supplied photos, place orders via app, call, or WhatsApp, and get connected directly with the shop owner.
features: 13 grocery products with Hindi descriptions and real photos
Customer order placement with WhatsApp and phone call options
WhatsApp order notifications to shop owner
Permanent admin login for shop owner
PWA installable on phone home screen
Admin panel for managing products and orders
